headline: Thermo Fisher Unveils AI Orbitraps And Swedish Labs As Valuation Lags
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) introduced new Orbitrap mass spectrometers with AI-enabled software at the ASMS Conference. The instruments are designed to offer higher sensitivity and speed for complex pharmaceutical and life sciences research. The company also announced an expansion of its bioanalytical and biomarker laboratory network in Sweden. The new Swedish facility is intended to support clients across all phases of drug development.
